mutation_policy: Non-mutating public contributor worklist for the top-50/Vanderbilt engine. It ranks bounded public-safe operator actions from committed verification, snapshot, Vanderbilt batch-packet, decision-audit, and gap manifest artifacts. It does not approve person ingestion, parser output as accepted people, training-state mutation, denominator closure, school verification, URL rewrite, unsupported-label ingestion, enrichment acceptance, raw dump publication, or unique-person identity collapse.
prohibited_mutations: person_ingestion; parser_output_as_accepted_people; training_state_mutation; denominator_closure; school_verification; url_rewrite; unsupported_label_ingestion; enrichment_acceptance; raw_dump_publication; unique_person_identity_collapse
recommended_next_action: Run python3 scripts/materialize_top50_public_clone_verification.py after any public top-50 artifact change.
required_next_evidence: All public-clone verification rows must pass before reviewer work or source-discovery work starts.
success_condition: 33 verification rows pass and fail_rows remains 0.

approval_required_for: accepted_person_rows; person_ingestion; denominator_closure; identity_reconciliation; parser_acceptance; scope_closure
